awesomeList.descriptionHTML:  A curated list of awesome applications, softwares, tools and shiny things for macOS.
awesomeList.description:  A curated list of awesome applications, softwares, tools and shiny things for macOS.

nodes.itemHTML: • EtreCheck - Output system information and configuration to get more informed help from Apple support professionals.
